rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings such as assignments, ensuring subcomponents and connections are properly referenced.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) are used for contract expressions.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Validate scalar type names (int, real, bool) in const and eq declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested if ... then ... else syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not use Boolean domain values as integers unless the AADL port is explicitly defined as AGREE bool.
